# Firebreather's Tail
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Firebreather%27s%20Tail&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Firebreather's Tail
| desc = Cut off from the body of the fallen Firebreather and covered in it's searing blood.
| tier = ST
| slot = dagger

| minDmg = 85
| maxDmg = 190
| shots = 1
| rof = 
| range = 
| projSpeed = 10
| lifetime = 550
| fameb = 5
| feedp = 500

| effects = yes
| pierce = yes

| lootbag = white
| dropsFrom = can be found in a White Bag dropped by: [[Firebreather]].
|rarity = a|range2 = 5.7}}

<noinclude>
{{NavDaggers}}
[[Category: Daggers]]
[[Category:Tiered weapons]]
</noinclude>
